verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You ask me why I love the Lord, Why He means so much to me, Why He’s there between each breath of life that I breathe? Oh I’ve tried to count the reasons There’s far too many to recall So I guess you could say I love the Lord Just because…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I don’t love Him Just because He first loved me And I don’t love Him Just because of Calvary For there’s at least a million reasons I start to count and then I paused to realize I really love Him just because

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Not just for the loaves and fishes Not just for cleansing from my sins Not just for the signs and wonders Do I follow after Him It makes no difference if He blesses me It matters not just what befall For I'll love Him till forever just because…
